overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character observing a street food vendor at night, then walking through a neon-lit alley with red lanterns, and approaching a bar counter. The scene features dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere with steam vents, neon signage, and NPC interactions.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor corner in cyberpunk alley

events.description: steam puffs rise from the food cart grill

agents.ego_description: standing still observing the food vendor and nearby pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white tank top and cap sitting in blue plastic chair
person in trench coat standing and eating food from the cart

entered.detail: food vendor cart with bright cyan neon lighting and steam
simple blue plastic chair where NPC is seated
tall vertical neon sign with red asian characters
staircase with green neon lighting at the top

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a stationary view of a cyberpunk street food vendor at night. A person sits in a blue plastic chair on the left while another stands in the center eating. Steam rises from the neon-lit food cart, and a vertical neon sign glows in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with hanging red lanterns

events.description: camera begins moving forward and panning right away from the food vendor
moving from the enclosed vendor corner into the open alley with steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the alley passing the food vendor and moving toward the bar area

entered.detail: circular street grate emitting steam into the air
large yellow industrial pipes running up the building facade
multiple red paper lanterns hanging across the street
vertical neon advertisement sign with cola branding
open-air bar counter with purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera begins moving forward through the cyberpunk alley, leaving the food vendor behind. Steam rises from a street grate as the view opens to show industrial pipes and red paper lanterns strung overhead. The bar counter becomes visible in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air bar counter with purple neon lighting

events.description: approaching the bar counter where a woman is standing
camera slows and focuses on the magazine on the counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar counter and examining the items on the surface

notable_agents.action: woman with braided hair standing behind the bar holding a glowing drink

entered.detail: magazine with cover text 'ON A ROLL' featuring a muscular figure
white metal napkin dispenser on the counter
glass case with items inside sitting on the counter
metal shelving unit with bottles behind the bar

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the bar counter where a woman with braided hair stands behind the purple-lit surface. The focus shifts to a magazine titled 'ON A ROLL' lying on the counter next to a napkin dispenser. The surrounding area features glass display cases and metal shelving as the camera examines the details of the bar setup.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling street food stall into the intimate, neon-lit interior of a cyberpunk bar. It begins with a stationary view of a food vendor at night, where steam rises from a glowing cart beside patrons seated in blue plastic chairs. As the camera moves forward, it leaves the vendor behind to navigate a narrow alleyway filled with rising steam from street grates and red paper lanterns strung beneath industrial pipes. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches a purple-lit bar counter, shifting focus from a woman with braided hair to a magazine titled 'ON A ROLL' resting next to a napkin dispenser. Finally, the view lingers on the detailed bar setup, scanning across glass display cases and metal shelving.
